valueProp: Detect viral Telegram content before it explodes
_signupUrlNote: Relative path assumes landing and SPA are served from the same edge/domain (e.g., Cloudflare routing: /sign-up → SPA). To override for a separate SPA domain, set an absolute URL here, e.g. https://app.foresignal.biz/sign-up.
_showcaseTelegramUrlNote: Public Telegram showcase channel with live detections (e.g. https://t.me/...). Empty string = showcase links are not rendered. Filled by owner once the channel is created (TASK-070).

compliance.publicChannelsNote: Foresignal monitors only public Telegram channels (@username). Private channels are not accessible.
compliance.retentionNote: Raw message content is not stored beyond 48 hours. Only metadata and trend signals are retained.

plans.name: Trader
plans.description: API keys + real-time + webhook + 90d history + 500 channels

pricing.paymentNote: Payments accepted via cryptocurrency (NOWPayments). No credit card required.

legal.address: Komunalna St 16, Hlukhiv, Sumy Oblast, 41400, Ukraine
legal.courts: the competent courts located in Ukraine
